steps.title: Use the height context
steps.content: The phrase "of a good height" describes Mr. French's physical stature. In this context, "good" does not mean morally good or dependable; it means notable in amount or size.

steps.title: Remove non-size meanings
steps.content: Choice A describes behavior. Choice C describes ability. Choice D describes dependability. None of those meanings fits a description of height. The word meaning substantial or notable in amount fits the sentence. The answer is B.
